transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.description: Represents an audio transcription record in Bangla

title.description: The custom title given to this transcription

audioDataUrl.description: Optional base64 audio data URL for playing the audio back

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last revision

ownerId.description: The Google User ID of the transcription owner

ownerName.description: The display name of the owner

ownerEmail.description: The email address of the owner

collaborators.description: List of user emails invited to collaborate on this document

isPublic.description: Whether the transcription is publicly accessible via a link

audioDuration.description: Duration of the transcribed audio in seconds

/transcriptions/{transcriptionId}.description: Collection of Bangla transcriptions shared among collaborators
